title: BPMN Authoring Input
description: Input schema for BPMN 2.0 business process authoring.

processName.description: Name of the business process to model.

sourceWorkflow.description: Textual description or reference to the workflow to model.

existingBpmn.description: Path to existing BPMN file to update.

participants.description: Actor/participant IDs involved in the process.
